procedures not followed 
286 = Appeal time limits not met 
288 = Referral absent 
289 = Services considered under the dental and medical plans, benefits not available. Notes: Also refer 
to CARCs 254, 270, and 280 
A0 = Patient refund amount 
A1 = Claim/Service denied. At least one remark code must be provided (may be comprised of either 
the NCPDP reject reason code, or remittance advice remark code that is not an ALERT.) 
A2 = Contractual adjustment. (No longer used: 01/01/2008, use code 45
